name: Google Sheets to CRM Lead Sync
description: JD Requirement: 'Build workflow automations using Make'. Syncs leads from Google Sheets (used by marketing team for event registrations) to the AI CRM via API.

config.message: 📋 New event lead: {{Name}} interested in {{Vehicle Interest}} (Source: Google Sheets)

business_impact: Eliminates manual data entry from event registrations. Leads appear in CRM within 5 minutes of being added to the sheet.
